Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report with the live Dream inventory data, appending status columns and flagging dead-end parts that have no available source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable triage document, so the team immediately knows which orders can be resolved and which are stuck.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder items, pre-written based on each part's current status and flag type.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates manual drafting for routine backorder updates, ensuring customers receive timely, consistent communication without adding workload to the team.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, and year fitment data for all available two-piece rotor SKUs.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor fitment reference in minutes that would take days to compile manually across three separate catalog sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify coverage matches, gaps, and new opportunity vehicles.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly shows Dino where DFC competes, where it's missing coverage, and which vehicles represent the highest-priority expansion opportunities.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking them to confirm demand for two-piece rotors on specific vehicles identified as coverage gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from the market without requiring manual outreach, giving Dino data-backed justification for new product development decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields for the presence of specific flagged phrases or keywords defined by the user.
Meta Investigation.impact: Audits the entire active ad library in one pass, catching compliance or brand issues that would be easy to miss across dozens of active ads.

Meta Investigation.action: Reviews the collected ad copy, confirms phrase matches, identifies the exact field where each match appears, and compiles a structured flagged list.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, field-level audit report rather than a raw data dump, so the team can act immediately without additional interpretation.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the flagged list as a formatted report, including the ad ID, platform, field name, and exact copy where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a complete, actionable compliance report in the right person's inbox on demand, eliminating the need to manually comb through the ads manager.

Paid Channel Chat Bot.action: Pulls live campaign data from both Meta and TikTok ad accounts, including performance metrics, audience targeting, spend, and active creative details.
Paid Channel Chat Bot.impact: Gives the chatbot a real-time, unified view of paid channel performance across both platforms without requiring manual exports or platform switching.

Paid Channel Chat Bot.action: Interprets the combined Meta and TikTok data to answer on-demand questions, surface trends, flag anomalies, and provide performance context in plain language.
Paid Channel Chat Bot.impact: Enables the team to get instant, intelligent answers about paid channel performance without waiting on a data analyst or pulling reports manually.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@ inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details, and routes them into the workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every inbound application is captured and processed immediately, eliminating the risk of candidates being missed in a busy shared inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to an organized Drive folder structure, categorized by role and applicant name for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable resume archive that replaces scattered email attachments and gives HR a reliable record of every applicant.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the open role, produces a hire/deny/pause recommendation, and generates a draft reply appropriate to that decision.
Resume Bot.impact: Reduces resume screening time from hours to seconds per candidate and ensures every applicant receives a consistent, fair evaluation against the same criteria.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant's name, role, score, decision, and reply status to a dashboard, with denied and approved candidates tracked separately from a Pending tab for paused-role applicants.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives HR a real-time hiring dashboard that replaces manual tracking, and ensures paused candidates are never lost when a role reopens.

summary: The AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 56 total agents across the team — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline remains steady heading into the next push. The focus this week stays on advancing the 10 in-progress builds toward completion and continuing to scope out the 17 planned projects on the horizon. Great work to everyone keeping the momentum going — the pipeline is a testament to how much this team has built in a short amount of time!
